GITHUB_OWNER.description: GitHub owner of the private Obsidian notes repository.

GITHUB_REPO.description: Name of the private Obsidian notes repository.

MAX_FILE_BYTES.description: Maximum file size accepted by the Worker. The default is 20971520 (20 MiB).

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: Fine-grained GitHub token restricted to the notes repository with Contents read/write.

SYNC_TOKEN.description: Generate a random administrator token with `openssl rand -base64 32` and save it in a password manager.

DB.description: D1 stores one-time pairing codes and revocable per-device credentials.
